---
name: nezam-error-tracking
description: Sentry/Logtail integration with source maps, release correlation, and structured alert routing.
version: 1.0.0
updated: 2026-05-08
changelog: []
---

# Purpose

Specify error capture, source-map upload, release correlation, and alert routing so production errors are observable, attributable, and actionable. Single-responsibility: error-tracking pipeline.

# Inputs

- Observability backbone from `@.cursor/skills/nezam-monitoring-observability/SKILL.md`.
- DevOps pipeline from `@.cursor/skills/nezam-devops-pipeline/SKILL.md`.
- Auth + privacy context from `@.cursor/skills/nezam-auth-workflows/SKILL.md` and `@.cursor/skills/nezam-privacy-compliance/SKILL.md`.
- Frontend architecture from `@.cursor/skills/nezam-react-architecture/SKILL.md`.

# Step-by-Step Workflow

1. Choose vendor: Sentry (rich UI, traces + errors), Logtail (logs-first), Rollbar/Bugsnag (alternatives); document trade-offs.
2. SDK setup: per platform (browser, Node, Edge, Worker); minimal init at entry, environment + release tag.
3. Source maps: upload from CI on every release; do not ship public maps (unless intentional); verify symbolication.
4. Release correlation: tag errors with release SHA + version; mark resolved/unresolved per release.
5. Filtering: scrub PII via `beforeSend` (emails, tokens, request bodies), drop noisy errors (network aborts, ad-block) with allowlists.
6. Alerting: thresholds (new issue, regression, high-volume), route by service/owner; integrate with on-call.
7. SLO impact: tie error rate to SLO burn; auto-create tickets for sustained burn.

# Validation & Metrics

- Source maps uploaded on every prod release; symbolication ≥ 99%.
- PII never present in error payloads (audit sample monthly).
- New-issue alert fires within 5 min of first occurrence.
- Regression alerts catch errors reintroduced in following releases.
- Median time-to-acknowledge < 15 min for critical alerts.

# Output Format

- `docs/specs/ERROR_TRACKING.md` (vendor, SDKs, scrubbing, alerts).
- SDK init snippets per runtime (browser, Node, Edge, Worker).
- Source-map upload step in CI.
- Alert routing matrix.
- Privacy scrubbing rules.

# Integration Hooks

- `/SCAN security` validates scrubbing rules.
- `/SAVE log` records release tag + error counts.
- Pairs with `@.cursor/skills/nezam-monitoring-observability/SKILL.md`, `@.cursor/skills/nezam-devops-pipeline/SKILL.md`, `@.cursor/skills/nezam-privacy-compliance/SKILL.md`, `@.cursor/skills/nezam-react-architecture/SKILL.md`.
- Honors `[.cursor/rules/workspace-orchestration.mdc](.cursor/rules/workspace-orchestration.mdc)`.

# Anti-Patterns

- Public source maps without intent.
- PII leaking into breadcrumbs (form values, URLs).
- Alert on every noisy error (browser extensions, aborted fetches).
- No release tagging (errors lump across versions).
- Ignoring resolved-then-regressed signal.

# External Reference

- Sentry docs (https://docs.sentry.io/) — current.
- Logtail / Better Stack docs (current).
- Source map specification (https://sourcemaps.info/spec.html).
- W3C Trace Context for cross-correlation (https://www.w3.org/TR/trace-context/).
- Closest skills.sh/official analog: error-tracking / sentry.
